narrative: A Machine Learning Engineer at BYJU'S with 4 years of experience, currently based in Noida, drove this ranking. The primary driver was their verified skill depth. Their background aligns with the JD's requirements, particularly in Search & Retrieval skills like LlamaIndex and Elasticsearch. However, their experience level falls short of the target 5-9 years. A minor concern with profile credibility also impacted their ranking, landing them at #8 out of 100.
